tagline: Expert Tree Services for the Chicago Area
hero_subtitle: Sophisticated stewardship for your landscape. We blend arboricultural expertise with precision care to maintain the health and beauty of your property.
service_area_description: Serving Berwyn, Riverside, Oak Park & the Chicago Area.
services_subtitle: Comprehensive care for your urban forest, from meticulous pruning to hazardous removals.
reviews_subtitle: Trusted by homeowners and businesses across the Chicago area.
cta_subtitle: Get a transparent, itemized quote for your project within 24 hours.
footer_description: Arboricultural stewards for Chicago's western suburbs. Committed to safety, health, and the local ecosystem.

services_featured.name: Tree Removal
services_featured.description: Precision removal for hazardous, dead, or encroaching trees in tight urban spaces.

services_secondary.name: Stump Grinding
services_secondary.description: Deep-root grinding to reclaim your landscape and prepare for new growth.

services_accent.name: Emergency Service
services_accent.description: 24/7 rapid response for storm damage and dangerous limb failure.

services_wide.name: Artistic Pruning
services_wide.description: Maintenance that promotes structural integrity and aesthetic silhouette.

about_features.title: Stickney Roots
about_features.description: Deeply integrated in the Stickney, IL community. We know the local soil, common tree diseases, and regional growth patterns.

about_features.title: Safety First Culture
about_features.description: Fully insured and licensed professionals. We utilize industrial-grade rigging and modern climbing technology to ensure zero property damage.

about_features.title: Sustainable Disposal
about_features.description: We don't just clear; we recycle. Removed materials are processed into premium mulch or repurposed for urban timber projects.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: The most professional tree service I've ever used. They removed a 50ft dying elm between my house and the neighbor's with surgical precision.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: County Tree Service cleared our storm damage in record time. Their cleanup was so thorough, you couldn't even tell they had been there.

reviews.name: James L.
reviews.text: They are more like artists than tree cutters. Our old maple looks rejuvenated and healthy thanks to their structural pruning.

portfolio.title: Hazardous Oak Removal - Lincoln Park
